finding: 18% feel unconfident recognising scams — highest across generations
72% scam exposure rate — highest by location
88% felt very or somewhat stressed by the experience
20% took on additional debt or loans as a result of being scammed
27% of scam victims did not report (73% did report)
Only 11% recovered any money lost to scams
74% of stolen funds sent via digital e-wallet
85% of scam encounters happen on platforms with direct message functionality
Social engineering, account takeover & identity theft = 76% of total fraud losses
Investment scam most prevalent: 65% of scam victims experienced it
